revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data State of Burma]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = State of Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma 1943.svg | name = {{{name|}}} | size = {{{size|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, State </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = State of Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma 1943.svg | name = {{{name|}}} | size = {{{size|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, State </noinclude> }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = State of Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma 1943.svg | name = {{{name|}}} | size = {{{size|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, State </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_State_of_Burma here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_State_of_Burma for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = State of Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = Flag of Burma 1943.svg | name = {{{name|}}} | size = {{{size|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Myanmar | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = British Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar | cat = Burma, State </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
